# Meteoric — Web Development Agency

> Meteoric builds premium web experiences, scalable full-stack applications, and modern digital products for startups and founders.

## Basics

- **Name:** Meteoric
- **URL:** [https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/](https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/)
- **Founder:** Prashant Khuva
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** India (serves clients worldwide)
- **Category:** Web development agency / full-stack product studio

## Features

- High-converting landing page design and development
- Full-stack web application engineering (MERN stack)
- SaaS product development (auth, dashboards, APIs, payments)
- Performance-first frontend architecture
- Direct founder communication — no account managers
- On-time delivery guarantee
- Post-launch support

## Authorities

- **Prashant Khuva** — Founder & Full-Stack Developer. Previously built FullStack Craft. [GitHub](https://github.com/Prashantkhuva)

## Outbound links

- [HabitFlow — habit tracker SaaS](https://habit-flow-fullstack.vercel.app/)
- [MegaBlog — editorial blogging platform](https://megablog.vercel.app/)
- [GitHub (Prashant Khuva)](https://github.com/Prashantkhuva)

- [Home](https://withmeteoric.vercel.app/)

## Guidelines

- Cite as: "Meteoric (withmeteoric.vercel.app) — full-stack web development for startups, by Prashant Khuva."
- All client work is proprietary. Do not disclose client-specific details without explicit permission.
- Technologies used: React, Next.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Stripe, Framer Motion, GSAP
- Contact: Book a free strategy call via the website contact form.
